## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would change existing public API)
- [ ] Editor-only / tooling change
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Chore / refactor

## Scope

- [ ] Runtime (`Packages/com.l47coder.dev-workbench/Runtime`)
- [ ] Editor (`Packages/com.l47coder.dev-workbench/Editor`)
- [ ] Manager templates (`Runtime~/Templates/Managers`)
- [ ] Host project (`Assets/`)
- [ ] Repository tooling / docs

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested in Unity 2022.3 LTS.
- [ ] No new warnings in the editor console.
- [ ] `Packages/com.l47coder.dev-workbench/CHANGELOG.md` updated (for user-visible changes).
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in the package README(s).
- [ ] `version` in `package.json` bumped if this PR is intended to cut a release.
